calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Petition For Authority To Give Consent For Medical Treatment
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Grant Tomioka for Joann Martin (Respondent). Aleeta Van Runkle, City Attorney for San Francisco General Hospital ("SFGH") (Petitoner).

The Parties appeared for the purpose of expanding the request for Dementia powers to include authorization to place the Patient in a secured dementia unit facility located at Laguna Honda Hospital. The Court waived Joann Martin's appearance based on the representation of Counsel that she was medically unable and unwilling to attend. The Court found good cause to grant the Parties request to shorten time. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court granted the petition with a 45 day review period (signing the order for the same in open Court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR #11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
